message:
docs(readme): replace fictional compute_ratio_column with inline expression (br-cz3gf / fd90.180)

fd90.180: same pattern as fd90.162's compute_weight fix. The Apply
and Transform assign_fn example at lines 663-668 had:

  ("ratio", Box::new(|df| {
      Ok(compute_ratio_column(df))
  })),

compute_ratio_column is a fictional placeholder — it doesn't exist
anywhere. A user copy-pasting hits:
  error[E0425]: cannot find function `compute_ratio_column` in this scope

Fix: replace with an inline closure that actually computes the
ratio column from two existing columns (revenue / cost), using
Column::from_values to build the resulting Column. The closure
returns Result<Column, FrameError> as required by assign_fn's
Box<dyn Fn(&DataFrame) -> Result<Column, FrameError>> signature.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
